name: Request Agent Task
description: Send a request to an agent and get a response. This is the PRIMARY tool for all agent interactions — asking questions, submitting tasks, or requesting actions. Creates a tracked Job with a result. Set wait=true to get the response inline. Use this instead of agent_message unless you explicitly want a fire-and-forget notification.

input.description: Request input data to send to the agent. Pass the full structured data the agent needs — do not summarise or wrap it.

wait.description: Wait for the agent to complete. true = block until done (recommended for pipelines). false or omit = return immediately with PENDING status. Can also be an integer for timeout in milliseconds.

output.description: Task status. When wait=true and the agent completes, includes the full output.
